project.title: DPF3 and SNIP1 IP-MS in 786-O cells
project.projectDescription: In this project, we performed DPF3 and SNIP1 immunoprecipitation followed by mass spectrometry analysis to identify their interacting partners.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: 786-O cells expressing HA-tagged DPF3a were washed with ice-cold PBS and homogenized in lysis buffer containing protease and phosphatase inhibitors. The DPF3a-associated proteins were immunoprecipitated with anti-HA beads (Thermo) for 2 hours. After three times washing with TBST, an on-beads digestion with sequencing-grade trypsin (Promega) was carried out. Afterwards, the samples were analyzed on an LTQ-Orbitrap Elite mass spectrometer system (Thermo).
project.dataProcessingProtocol: IP-MS data was processed by MaxQuant for label-free quantification with “match between run” function activated and database searching was against the UniProt human database.
